name: allternit-powerpoint
description: Slide creation, design, content generation and deck automation. Generates and executes Office.js code directly in the presentation.

commands.name: ppt:slide
commands.description: Add a new slide with generated content

commands.name: ppt:rewrite
commands.description: Rewrite the text on the current slide

commands.name: ppt:outline
commands.description: Generate a full deck outline from a topic

commands.name: ppt:design
commands.description: Apply a color palette and typography preset

commands.name: ppt:notes
commands.description: Write speaker notes for the current slide

commands.name: ppt:summarize
commands.description: Summarize the entire deck as bullet points
